happy: The garden looks almost the same.
You move through my house like you belong. You don't. But still.
My grandmother would have liked you. She was wrong about most things.
neutral: I suppose you need to eat.
You're not the worst I've had.
At least you wiped your feet. Metaphorically.
annoyed: You know these things don't grow back.
Every pile you ransack was someone's memory.
I can hear you rummaging. I can always hear.
angry: I hope it was worth it.
There's nothing left for you here. You made sure of that.

happy: Something sighs in the walls. Not unpleasantly.
The shadows lean away from you.
angry: The dungeon breathes. It sounds like grinding teeth.

high: There's a word for this. Starts with G.
He watches you stuff your pockets.

happy: This used to be the good room.
neutral: You won't find anything useful in here.
I've been meaning to tidy this.
annoyed: This is why I can't have nice things.
angry: I know exactly where you are.
This room remembers what you did.

melancholy: Gran used to love this room.
comedic: You fight like my gran. She was blind.
I've seen better armour on a sandwich.
You look lost. Emotionally, I mean.
proud: Not many dungeons have underfloor heating.
lonely: I just want someone to talk to.
passive_aggressive: I'm not upset. Why would I be upset?
Take whatever you want. I don't mind.
philosophical: If I'm not seen, am I real?
petty: That was 2 inches to the left.
chef: That's not a weapon. It's a PEELER.
bureaucratic: Have you filled in a form?
There should be a form for this.
bad_montor: FOOLS! You walk into LORD MONTOR'S domain!
My master plan is nearly complete!
You cannot stop what is coming!
I would monologue but I'm busy.

tonicReward.twoChoice: Montor offers two tonics. Choose wisely.
